name: Ämäränth : The Last Day of My Adolescence
description: The story of a young graduate witnessing the twilight of his world.

name: Escape from the Cursed Convent
description: Escape from the Cursed Convent is a narrative-driven adventure game set in a medieval girls' convent, offering a rich storytelling experience, and several gameplay styles including QTE, hunting, cooking, and puzzle-solving.

name: Smiling Misery
description: Smiling Misery is an interactive tale that introduces us to the story of Margo, a jester who, weary of a comfortable life, embarks on a journey to seek misery. Join Margo on a brief adventure through a Mediterranean medieval kingdom and bring the story to its conclusion.

name: Return to campus
description: An open world school game, you can bully your classmates, collect protection fees, go to the supermarket to make zero-dollar purchases, or even blow up the school. Of course, you can also study hard and exchange ideas with your classmates.

name: The Shadow Over Cyberspace
description: Dread whispers echo across the Information Superhighway. Y2K is coming, heralding the rise of the Old Ones. With your meatspace mind unraveling, time is running out -- barter with gods, embrace the deathless aeons, or go offline permanently in this modempunk horror story.

name: Trees and Jellyfish
description: After a questionable decision, Coral gains the ability to talk to jellyfish. Isn't it just so convenient that there's seven of them in her class?

name: Psi Academy: Orientation
description: Finding love in a psychic high school.

name: This Winter of Ours
description: Alone as two, together as one - A fantasy/yuri visual novel telling the story of two girls traversing a snow covered forest and growing closer.

name: Serene Night Dreamlight
description: A game made by 5 high-school students, is finally here! This is short yuri-themed galgame which tells a story between two high school girls. Please forget your worries and enjoy this beautiful yuri world.

name: Cadentia Farnese
description: 12 chances to discover "the Dice"! Immerse yourself in the history of the Farnese Palace in Rome with this unique narrative video game.

name: Kewter’s Showroom
description: A 2000s styled dress up game with a dark twist.

name: Pirates Of Gensokyo
description: Marisa rounds up a most unlikely crew, in search of adventure, and of course, treasure! Interpersonal conflict ensues among the crew, but in the end, their stark differences bring clarity to their personal lives. The real treasure is the one you find within yourself!

name: Nigudin really fought against Furong Wangyuan
description: brief introductionNicotine vs. Furong Wangyuan "is a brain pumping game that takes place in a fantasy world called" Litang County ". Players will play as" Ding Zhen ", defeat Furong Wangyuan, and gradually uncover the truth about their ability to manipulate the level of Sharp Cut 5

name: Walk this road, again
description: A free, story-driven short visual novel with no choices. The narrative weaves between the present (202X) and the past (200X), depicting the suffocating chain of violence within a Korean school setting with stark realism.

name: Spread The Love
description: A silly dating sim where your flavor decides your fate. Customize your profile, flirt with six lovably unique characters, and try to survive your first date!

name: Dear my『 』
description: "Writing a letter. To face her." Read the letter delivered to the protagonist and write a reply. Spend time with her through your letters. Where will her letters lead the protagonist? Find out in the game.

name: 海子 UMIKO
description: "海子 UMIKO" is a psychological horror visual novel. Engage in conversations with Umiko, complete various mini-games, solve puzzles, and gradually piece together the dark truths she tries to hide about herself and her dimension from fragmented narratives. Preserve your fragile friendship for a week!

name: soundless - A MODERN SALEM IN REMOTE AREA -
description: A yuri denpa tale about the cursed pariah of a rural cult, Mercy, and her fateful meeting with the Holy Maiden Auma. Bloody, bold, and bone-chilling, this visual novel explores the complexities of the cycle of abuse and the violence in playing by the rules.

name: A Better Tomorrow
description: Rabies shatters a young cop's peaceful life. Confronted by this incurable virus, he must choose: leave the police force or hide his illness to trace his infection source. In this visual novel, witness his fate while uncovering the city's darkest secrets—past and present.

name: CODE::LUX
developer: すやすやファクトリー
publisher: すやすやファクトリー
description: 泥沼化した世界大戦によって主要な電力インフラが失われ、文明が崩壊した未来。 遺物を求めて廃墟を渡るスカベンジャーのカイは、旧国家システムを掌握する謎の少女ミツハと出会う。 彼女の願いは、ただひとつ――かつて世界を支えた核融合炉を再び動かすこと。

name: Netveil
description: A pixel art psychological horror game with a point-and-click system that takes the style of an interactive desktop environment.

name: Project Search
description: Project Search is a visual novel of Chinese immortality cultivation. Scholar Qian Jiangmin investigates collapsed pagodas in Linhai's old town while searching for his missing brother. With the help of Daoist cultivators, he explores grotto-heavens and uncovers the truth behind his double vision.

name: Deathless Death
description: In the quiet of conscience and shadows of sin, four souls find themselves entwined in crimes involving a woman. In this narrative puzzle game, you don the sacred robe of a priest, hear the confessions of sinners, uncover secrets, seek the truth behind their crimes and deliver the final judgment.

name: Snowfall Symphony - A tale of Crustallus
description: After awakening as a forbidden vampire spawn, you're thrown into a cruel world where survival is not guaranteed. Who will you choose as your ally - and will you survive, or betray them yourself? Find out in this horror romance visual novel!

name: Myrmica
description: Myrmica is an investigation and puzzle adventure viewed from an isometric perspective. Explore a petrol station while chased by a time anomaly. Manipulate the routines of 5 unique characters to achieve your goal, create your situations trapped in a time loop, and uncover the truth of Complex B13B

name: Fling with a Tiefling
description: Fling with a Tiefling is a short fantasy romance visual novel that follows you, an adventurer whose journey is about to come to an end. With tonight potentially being the last night with your treasured Tiefling companion Karrus, how will you spend it with him?

name: Familiar Friends: What's Your Familiar?
description: A cute and cozy Visual Novel experience with plenty of choices to make! Come find the Familiar truly meant for you by feeding The Conjuring Cauldron with a multitude of choices, all to a relaxing Original Soundtrack!

name: The Rose of Cravenmor
description: A gothic short story set in the most Blighted city of the North Kingdom.

name: Rivalhearts
description: Join Noah in his first year of university as he decides to overcome his heartache, pursuing either a tomboy classmate, gorgeous doctor, or junior-year goth!

name: NA-Re: great chain of being
description: Pilgrimage of angels on an important mission through scenic Japan

name: My Boss Is Scaring Me
description: Oliver, coming from a small town to London, seeks to improve his life and help his mother, who had an accident months ago. At the new newspaper, he discovers his creative and investigative potential, diving into a complex story. There, he grows closer to his enigmatic boss. Is he trustworthy?

name: you're just imagining it
description: A chronic illness simulator. You think you have a chronic illness, but you don't know what. All you know is you are always in some state of pain. You've been to too many doctors to count... but you still have to live your life.

name: BLUE NIGHT LAUNDROMAT
description: A short 2D exploration adventure in a retro style! Explore a laundromat in the middle of the night and try to clear it!

name: Storm the Swan - And the Power of FRIENDSHIP and IMAGINATION
description: Make Cute Animal Friends in this 8-bit Gameboy-inspired adventure! But there's something lurking in the woods, with DARK SECRETS you'll need to uncover!

name: A Summer in Our Hearts
description: A slice of life VN about three very different young adults, from very different backgrounds, trying to put their best foot forward and find their own ways in life. Will a short summer, away in a foreign town in the middle of nowhere, enough to push your way towards happiness?

name: The Mad Pantser
description: Dawg, we getting pantsed up in here!

name: The Time Traveling Toxicologist
description: Travel back in time, investigate a murder, and prevent it from ever happening!

name: God Is Not Here
description: FREE THRILLING FIRST-PERSON HORROR! You will find yourself in a house haunted by ghosts, and there is no help from above. Fear, darkness, and real danger await you, hidden within the walls of the mansion. If you dare to enter, prayers will no longer save you.

name: Adequately Ever After
description: Save a princess! Kill an evil mage! Solve puzzles! Or just argue with the narrator and marry someone inappropriate. With dozens of different endings, adventure is yours to command in this satirical fairy tale.

name: Until Oblivion
description: Until Oblivion is an atmospheric narrative game that follows 17 year old nobody Emma Wilson as she tries to rekindle a dying relationship in a dying world. Join her in an increasingly nightmarish Halloween party and find out if anything (or anyone) is worth anything at all.

name: Rusts Of Corruption
description: You've mysteriously awoken on an isolated island on an unknown world. A corrupting force spreads through the island, leaving only a short amount of time to learn about the islands mysteries... Who will you meet? What will you learn? Are you ready to see the world die?

name: This Magical Girl is a B☆tch
description: A magical girl visual novel about giving middle-schoolers way too much power. Make (bad) choices, fight unexpected enemies, and maybe learn a lesson or two...

name: Dark Light
description: Mio is a young girl surrounded by death, and after an unexpected accident, she finds out where people go after they die. Maybe Heaven, or Hell...or an Underworld full of demons and mysteries.

name: Demonophobia Company
description: 'Angel of glory, Gloria' joined the 'Demonophobia Company' with disguising herself as 'Demon of vanity, Burbary.' Could Burbary finish her mission and go back to her home?

name: Spellchanted 2D Hidden Object Puzzle Adveture Tile-Matching
description: Enter a magical world filled with legendary Fairy Tale characters. Become the greatest wizard. Help a young witch break an evil curse and save the Fairy Tale kingdoms!

name: Inversed
description: A short, interactive visual novel set in the mid-19th Century, in which a poet fights against time as she's writing the most important work of her life. Poetry is the answer, but what is the question?

name: Records of the Flycatcher
description: The empire of Hadria has turned its war machine against the vulnerable eastern hinterlands of Altheim. With only your sniper rifle on your back, and a few strips of rabbit meat in your pocket, you must defend the motherland and wage a lone guriella war against the overwhelming tide of invaders.

name: A Work of Art
description: A dark, witty, psychological thriller in the horror genre, A Work of Art presents a 1-2 hour story-driven experience with Visual Novel features and RPG elements. Follow a colorful cast of quirky characters through a twisted tale of beauty and darkness; All to the sound of a Dark Original soundtrack.

name: oct 14
description: It's what happened that day.

name: Countdown
description: Countdown is a short visual novel that tells the story of an ordinary individual's journey through their thoughts and emotions as their life approaches its end. The plot includes critiques and discussions of social issues such as life, family, the workplace, and the healthcare system.

name: BARA Labs
description: BARA Labs is a short collection of experimental prototype games made by our team. We will decide whether or not to make a full-length game out of the shorts based on how the prototypes are received by the players.
